input.user_input: What is the dispute resolution process described in this agreement? Does it require mediation before arbitration?

actual: It appears you have not provided or uploaded the agreement. Please provide the document, and I will gladly review it to explain the dispute resolution process and determine whether it requires mediation prior to arbitration.
